---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new monitoring capability, dashboard enhancement, or sentry expansion
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you'd like to see

A clear description of the new capability or improvement.

## Why this would help

What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed implementation (optional)

If you have an idea of how it could work — describe it. (Remember: stdlib-only constraint for `scripts/`.)

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why are they less good?

## Additional context

Examples, screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, etc.
